title: GraphysX archived TV3D particle preset library

opaque.label: Explosion3
opaque.reason: Compiled TVP survives without a readable TVPJ companion; emitter fields are intentionally not guessed.

fidelityBoundary.exact: TVPJ emitter/attractor fields, compiled/readable hashes, exact aliases and surviving DDS bytes.
fidelityBoundary.adapted: Seeded component-random direction, fixed-step integration, batched point sprites, inspection normalization and approximate Three.js blend mapping.
fidelityBoundary.unavailable: TV3D private RNG/integrator/blend-state recipes and emitter/particle interpolation implementation.
